## Clay Lubricant
Gyeon ClayLube is neutral and designed to work with any type and brand of clay bars. It does not affect the clay and remains safe for even the most delicate bars. Additionally, it does not cause any staining on the paint, making your claying process extremely easy.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Claylube1.webp?v=1703029686&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Claylube2.webp?v=1703029690&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Claylube3.webp?v=1703105733&width=2400)

SLICK AND CONCENTRATED
Gyeon ClayLube offers extreme slickness, reducing friction to prevent the clay from 'grabbing' and marring the surface. Instead, the clay effortlessly slips over the surface, revealing smooth paint. While ideally used with Gyeon Clay for optimal results, it can be applied with any clay bars, towels, mitts, or discs for lubrication. It can be diluted down to a 1:10 ratio, providing excellent economy without compromising its high performance, ensuring effective lubrication for the clay to perform its job.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/d68588e4-09a0-4ae7-bae5-692ced326c7e.png?v=1638493070&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q-clay-mild-100g)

Use Gyeon Clay Mild for Optimum results.

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q-clay-coarse-100g)

## Coarse Clay
Use with Gyeon Clay Coarse for heavy contamination. 

[
Shop GYEON Clay Coarse
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q-clay-coarse-100g)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-decon.jpg?v=1701891931&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q2m-iron-redefined)

## Iron Remover
Use Gyeon Iron to decontaminate before claying for a safer and more efficient decontamination process.

[
Shop GYEON Iron
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q2m-iron-redefined)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Claylube4.webp?v=1703110785&width=2400)

Tips & Tricks
The formula of Gyeon ClayLube allows for dilution up to 1:10 without compromising the slickness of the product. This versatility makes it an excellent choice for both professional detailers and enthusiasts. We recommend diluting the product less for heavier decontamination.
**TIP**: Spray generously on one panel at a time. Rinse the car after completing the claying process to easily remove any potential streaks.
**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

## Ultra concentrated Dilute 1:25

Q²M ClayLube Redefined is completely neutral and designed to work seamlessly with any type and brand of clay bars. It has no adverse effects on the clay and remains safe for even the most delicate bars, without causing any staining on the paint.

**EXTREMELY SLICK AND CONCENTRATED: **Q²M ClayLube Redefined boasts extreme slickness, minimizing friction to prevent the clay from 'grabbing' and marring the surface. Instead, the clay effortlessly glides over, revealing a smooth paint finish. While it works ideally with Q²M Clay EVO for optimal results, it can be used with any clay bars, cloths, or discs for lubrication. Q²M ClayLube Redefined can be diluted up to a 1:25 ratio, ensuring excellent economy without compromising its high performance and still providing effective lubrication for the clay to perform its task.

**REDEFINED: **Introducing our REDEFINED line – at GYEON, we've elevated our renowned chemical formulas to a new level. Meticulously reworked and refined, they deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and utmost ease of use. Our commitment is to provide our customers with the best user experience possible.

**BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: **The formula of Q²M ClayLube Redefined allows for dilution up to 1:25 without compromising product slickness, making it an excellent choice for both professional detailers and enthusiasts. TIP: Generously spray one panel at a time. After completing the claying process, rinse the car to easily remove any potential streaks.

PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL
SLICKNESS: EXTREME

Can I use QuickDetailer or soapy water as Claylube?

Yes, but Gyeon Clay Lube is way more cost-effective, safe, and provides much better slickness. Quick Detailer can be costly, and soapy water could potentially stain the paint if not rinsed in time.

Can it be used on Glass, Trim, and other surfaces?

Yes, it can be applied over the contaminated parts of your vehicle after the washing process and before paint correction.

How to store the product after use? What is the shelf life once opened?

Secure the sprayer in a closed position. Store it in a dry, dark, and cool place. Do not allow it to freeze, and avoid exposure to sunlight.
